---
title: Toits Paris 15
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557489/toitsprocheparis14_c6cr19.png
description: les toits de Paris 15
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2024/07/07
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557489/toitsprocheparis14_c6cr19.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
